title: Count to Five
description: Use a for loop with range() to print the numbers 1 through 5, each on its own line.

code_requirements.description: Uses a loop (for or while) to repeat code
code_requirements.fail_message: Use a 'for' or 'while' loop to print the numbers instead of printing each one individually.

code_requirements.description: Uses range() to generate the sequence of numbers
code_requirements.fail_message: Use range(1, 6) with your loop to generate the numbers 1 through 5.

hints: Use range(1, 6) to get the numbers 1 through 5
Use a for loop: for num in range(1, 6):
Inside the loop, print(num) to output each number on its own line
